Introducing Workspace Intelligence
Discover impactful, personalized AI that’s rooted in the context of your work.
Learn more
The better way to work
Join millions of businesses that run on premium versions of Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Meet, and more. Focus on getting results instead of looking for information with helpful, personalized AI.
Get started
What’s included
Premium features
Plans & pricing
FAQs
All the tools you need and a few more we think you’ll love.
Personalized AI built-in
Do your best work faster with intelligent tools that bring the context of your work to you.
Tools born in the Cloud
Collaborate in real time, from any device, across tools that are always up-to-date.
Enterprise-grade security
Protect your emails, files, and meetings with AI-powered security and compliance controls.
Personalized AI built-in
Do your best work faster with intelligent tools that bring the context of your work to you.
Tools born in the Cloud
Collaborate in real time, from any device, across tools that are always up-to-date.
Enterprise-grade security
Protect your emails, files, and meetings with AI-powered security and compliance controls.
Google Workspace includes:
Gmail
Custom business email

One subscription. So much premium value.
Gmail
Look professional with custom email @yourcompany
Stand out with a professional email at your company domain. Create branded layouts and personalize messaging with mail-merge.
Calendar
Simplify booking with appointment scheduling
Let customers book time with you directly within Google Calendar via a personal booking page.
Docs
Streamline contract management with eSignature
Request electronic signatures and easily manage vendor agreements, customer contracts, and more.
Drive
Securely store your data in the cloud
Store your data in Google’s security-by-design cloud infrastructure, with up to 5TB per user.
Meet
Connect seamlessly with video conferencing
Present professionally with high-quality video and noise cancellation. Record and transcribe to capture every detail.
Gemini
Work smarter with AI
Craft compelling content, generate data insights, and conduct deep research with the help of AI.
Security
Safeguard confidential data with AI
Automatically identify and classify sensitive data with AI to minimize data loss and meet compliance.

Security

Business Starter, Business Standard, and Business Plus plans can be purchased for a maximum of 300 users. There is no minimum or maximum user limit for Enterprise plans. Google Workspace customers may have access to additional features for a limited promotional period.
*Google Workspace provides flexible pooled storage per user that is shared across the organization. Business Starter includes 30 GB pooled storage per user, Business Standard includes 2 TB, Business Plus and Enterprise Plus include 5 TB. Visit our Help Center to learn more about getting additional storage for your organization.
Migrate your data with confidence
Securely copy your emails, files, and data to Google Workspace. Our tools and setup guides provide a smooth transition for teams of any size. For complex migrations, expert partners are available to help your team get started quickly.
Migration Resources
For small business
For enterprise
Find the answers that you need.
Expand all
Similar to G Suite, all Google Workspace plans provide a
custom email for your business
and include collaboration tools like Gmail, Calendar, Meet, Chat, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Slides, Forms, Sites, and more. For additional details, visit our plans and pricing page.
Gemini in Workspace apps is a powerful collaboration partner that can act as a coach, source of inspiration, and productivity booster — all while helping to ensure every user and organization has control over their data. Please visit our
AI page
to learn more.
We have a variety of plans that are designed to meet your unique business needs. To learn more about the various options, find a plan that fits your business needs on our
plans and pricing page
.
Absolutely. All plans feature a free 14-day trial, so you can start to see the value of Workspace before signing up.
Click here to start your free trial.
If you’re a business with less than 300 employees, you can get started
online today
. Companies with more than 300 employees can
contact sales
to learn more about our enterprise plans.
These
migration guides
help you move your organization’s data, such as email, calendar, contacts, folders, files, and permissions, to Google Workspace. To get started, you can
try Workspace for 14 days at no cost
.
As we’ve evolved G Suite into a more integrated experience across our communication and collaboration tools, we’ve rebranded to Google Workspace to more accurately represent the product vision.
View more FAQs
Explore Learning Center
Browse tips, guides, and how-to videos made for both new users and power users.
See resources
Get admin help
Sign in to find specific answers, manage users, or get support as a developer.
Get support
All the latest
Learn more about the future of work.
Stay up to date with the latest stories, events, and more with Google Workspace.

Starter, Standard, and Plus plans can be purchased for a maximum of 300 users. There is no minimum or maximum user limit for Enterprise plans. Google Workspace customers may have access to additional features for a limited promotional period.
*Google Workspace provides flexible pooled storage per user that is shared across the organization. Business Starter includes 30 GB pooled storage per user, Business Standard includes 2 TB, Business Plus and Enterprise Plus include 5 TB. Visit our Help Center to learn more about getting additional storage for your organization.
**Offer available to new Google Workspace customers only. This introductory price is only available for the first 20 users added, for 12 months. Standard pricing will apply to all users after 12 months. Actual price per user may vary by up to ~0.01% due to rounding. Final price will be shown before completing sign-up.

What's New in Google Workspace
Track Google Workspace launch announcements and rollout dates, and access related

Google Workspace Release Calendar
Click on calendar events for details about a new update, release, or training

Google Workspace Updates blog
. Exactly when features become

release track

France says non to Office 365 and Google Workspace in school

A practical guide to securing Google Workspace for a startup

analysis.name: Google Workspace
analysis.value_proposition: An AI-integrated cloud productivity suite combining email, docs, video, and collaboration with enterprise-grade security for businesses of all sizes.
analysis.ideal_customer: Businesses of 1–300+ users needing a fully integrated, cloud-native productivity suite with built-in AI and centralized admin controls.

features.name: gmail
features.description: Custom business email with branded domain (you@your-company.com)

features.name: google drive
features.description: Cloud file storage with pooled org-wide storage quotas

features.name: google meet
features.description: Video conferencing with participant limits tiered by plan

features.name: google chat
features.description: Team messaging with channels and direct messages

features.name: google calendar
features.description: Shared team and organization calendars

features.name: google tasks
features.description: Task lists and task management integrated with Calendar and Gmail

features.name: google docs
features.description: Collaborative cloud word processor

features.name: google sheets
features.description: Collaborative cloud spreadsheet application

features.name: google slides
features.description: Collaborative cloud presentation builder

features.name: google forms
features.description: Online forms and surveys with response collection

features.name: google sites
features.description: No-code builder for team and project internal sites

features.name: google keep
features.description: Digital notes with labels, reminders, and sharing

features.name: appsheet
features.description: No-code app and automation builder for business workflows

features.name: gemini ai assistant
features.description: Personalized AI assistant embedded across Gmail, Docs, Meet, Sheets, and more
features.evidence_quote: Gemini AI assistant in Gmail, Docs, Meet, and more

features.name: gemini app
features.description: Standalone AI chat application with model access tiered by plan
features.evidence_quote: Chat with AI in the Gemini app with expanded access to models and features

features.name: notebooklm
features.description: AI research assistant that synthesizes uploaded sources into Q&A and summaries
features.evidence_quote: NotebookLM with expanded access to features

features.name: notebooklm automatic drive syncing
features.description: Auto-syncs Google Drive files as NotebookLM sources when they change
features.evidence_quote: Keep your sources up to date with automatic Drive syncing in NotebookLM

features.name: google vids
features.description: AI-powered video creator and editor for workplace video content
features.evidence_quote: Google Vids AI-powered video creator and editor

features.name: real-time collaboration
features.description: Simultaneous multi-user editing across Docs, Sheets, and Slides
features.evidence_quote: Collaborate in real time, from any device, across tools that are always up-to-date.

features.name: pooled storage
features.description: Org-wide shared storage pool allocated per user (30 GB to 5 TB+ depending on plan)
features.evidence_quote: Google Workspace provides flexible pooled storage per user that is shared across the organization.

features.name: meeting recording
features.description: Record video meetings and save to Drive
features.evidence_quote: Video meetings with recording, noise cancellation, 150 participants

features.name: noise cancellation
features.description: AI-powered background noise suppression in Meet
features.evidence_quote: Video meetings with recording, noise cancellation, 150 participants

features.name: meeting attendance tracking
features.description: Track and report which participants attended a meeting
features.evidence_quote: Video meetings with attendance tracking, 500 participants

features.name: in-domain live streaming
features.description: Broadcast live meetings to large audiences within the organization
features.evidence_quote: Video meetings with in-domain live streaming, 1000 participants

features.name: appointment booking pages
features.description: Public scheduling pages for external visitors to book time

features.name: esignature

differentiators: Workspace Intelligence: personalized AI rooted in the context of your actual work
AI embedded natively across every app (not bolted on) — Gmail, Docs, Meet, Chat, Drive
NotebookLM as an AI research assistant with auto-syncing Drive sources
Google Vids: AI-native video creation tool built into the suite
Real-time multi-user collaboration born in the cloud, not ported from desktop
Microsoft Teams interoperability for Google Chat via NextPlane OpenHub
AI Classification for Drive with DLP enforcement at enterprise tier
Device Bound Session Credentials (DBSC) for hardware-level account takeover prevention
Assured Controls add-on for regulated/government compliance workloads
AppSheet no-code app builder included in suite

praised: Deep CLI tooling for power users (953-upvote HN thread on Google Workspace CLI)
U.S. Army adoption signals enterprise security credibility
Practical security hardening possible for startups (HN: 'A practical guide to securing Google Workspace for a startup')
complaints: Account suspension without warning or recourse ('My Google Workspace account suspension' — 369↑ HN)
Email deliverability issues — major European payment processor blocked from sending to Workspace users (609↑ HN)
Privacy concerns in education — France banned Office 365 and Google Workspace in schools
Users actively seeking alternatives ('Ask HN: Best hosted alternative to Google Workspace for email?' — 270↑)

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.headline_inclusions: 30 GB pooled storage, custom email, Gemini in Gmail, Meet 100p, Google Vids

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.headline_inclusions: 2 TB storage, Gemini across apps, NotebookLM, Meet recording/150p, eSignature, mail merge

tiers.name: Plus
tiers.headline_inclusions: 5 TB storage, eDiscovery, Vault, Secure LDAP, Meet attendance/500p, advanced endpoint mgmt

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: 5 TB+ storage, S/MIME, DLP, context-aware access, data regions, AI Classification, 1000p streaming

pricing.notes: 14-day free trial available. Starter/Standard/Plus capped at 300 users max; Enterprise has no user min/max. Current promo: 50% off first 3 months for new customers (valid through Sep 15 2026). Annual commitment saves ~16% vs monthly. Prices shown are annual-commitment per-user-per-month rates billed monthly. Enterprise add-ons: Assured Controls, AI Classification, Google Voice, Meet Hardware.
